stemHtml:
A pilot is on a VFR flight above a dense layer of fog, with bright light coming from above. The visibility is above 10 km and the sky is clear.

Which one of the following statements is correct?

options.a: Empty field myopia will make it quite hard to detect objects moving left or right.
options.b: Particularly long-sighted pilots will experience difficulties in this situation.
options.c: Particularly short-sighted pilots will experience difficulties in this situation.
options.d: Separation with other aircraft might be difficult to maintain. Even healthy eyes might experience short-sightedness in conditions without visual cues.
